indicators.name: open floor area
indicators.rationale: The kitchen layout allows for an open floor area suitable for yoga practice.

indicators.name: hardwood flooring
indicators.rationale: Hardwood flooring provides a smooth, non-slip surface for yoga mats.

indicators.name: cabinets and shelves
indicators.rationale: Cabinets and shelves obstruct the open floor area and create visual clutter.

indicators.name: kitchen appliances
indicators.rationale: Kitchen appliances like the stove and sink are not conducive to yoga practice.

reasoning_summary: The kitchen has an open floor area suitable for yoga practice, but the presence of cabinets and kitchen appliances obstructs the space and creates visual clutter, reducing the overall suitability to 3 out of 7.
